title: Robert Murray-Smith Live Stream - Zinc Hexacyanoferrate Battery
description: For those who cannot attend our in-house seminars - a "make it with Rob" workshop to build a zinchexacyanoferrate battery sandwiched between a discussion of the theory and feedback session.  Kits of the materials necessary to build the battery will be available from www.workingink.co.uk from 1st October.
